heroSubtitle: Build AI fluency across your organization — from leadership to frontline staff. We help your team understand what AI can do, how to use it responsibly, and where it fits in their work.

formats.title: Training
formats.subtitle: Flexible delivery designed to meet your team where they are.

items.title: Webinars
items.description: Live, interactive sessions that introduce AI concepts and use cases to large groups. Ideal for building awareness and starting the conversation across your organization.

items.title: Virtual Workshops
items.description: Hands-on, small-group sessions delivered remotely. Participants work through real scenarios and leave with practical skills they can apply immediately.

items.title: In-Person Workshops
items.description: On-site training tailored to your team's workflows and tools. The most immersive format — ideal for teams ready to put AI into practice.

items.title: Coaching
items.description: Ongoing one-on-one or small-group coaching that reinforces learning and supports adoption over time. Perfect for leaders driving AI strategy.

items.title: AI Fundamentals
items.description: What AI is, how it works, and what it means for healthcare — explained without the jargon.

items.title: Responsible AI Use
items.description: Ethics, bias, privacy, and governance frameworks that healthcare organizations need to understand before scaling AI.

items.title: AI in Your Workflow
items.description: Practical applications of AI in clinical, administrative, and operational settings specific to your organization.

items.title: Prompt Engineering
items.description: How to communicate effectively with AI tools to get better, more reliable results in day-to-day work.

whoItsFor.title: Who
whoItsFor.description: General AI training is designed for healthcare organizations at any stage of AI adoption.

items.title: Executive Leadership
items.description: Build the strategic understanding needed to make informed AI investment decisions.

items.title: Clinical Teams
items.description: Help providers and nurses understand how AI tools will change — and improve — their daily work.

items.title: Administrative Staff
items.description: Equip your operations, finance, and HR teams with practical AI skills for their workflows.

ctaTitle: Ready to Build AI Fluency Across Your Team?
ctaSubtitle: Let's design a training program that fits your organization.
